## Collections.CacheInvalidatingResultMapWrapper.(constructor)

Constructs a new cache-invalidating wrapper.

**Signature:**

```typescript
constructor(inner: TSRCMAP, parent: ConvertingResultMap<TK, TSRC, TTARGET, TSRCMAP>);
```
